---
name: Dispute classification
about: Challenge the severity, direction, pillar or rationale of a specific event
title: 'Dispute: <event-id> — <headline>'
labels: dispute,en
---

## Current classification

- **Event ID:** `<2026-Wxx-NNN>`
- **Pillar:** <electoral|governance|judicial|media|civil|corruption>
- **Severity:** <1-5 or null>
- **Direction:** <-1, 0, 1>
- **Status:** <active|resolved|disputed|needs_review>
- **Event date:** <YYYY-MM-DD>

## Why the classification is wrong

_Specific argument. What bothers you — the assigned pillar, severity, direction, rationale, something else? A reference to a specific point of the methodology helps:_

- [pillars.md](https://github.com/znackarna/democracy-index-cz/blob/main/methodology/pillars.en.md)
- [severity_rubric.md](https://github.com/znackarna/democracy-index-cz/blob/main/methodology/severity_rubric.en.md)

## Suggested correction (optional)

_Pillar / severity / direction you would use instead._

## Additional sources (optional)

_If you have another source that sheds light on the classification — a link._
